2023 RAM TRX Havoc Edition, 6.2L SC V8, AWD, 702bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 369,000 AED 5,781 / Month with 20% Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 21,814 KMs - Full Ram Service History - Ram Warranty Valid Until August 2028 or 100,000 KMs, - Full RAM Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Baja Yellow Exterior - RamBar - 12" Infotainment Touch Screen with U-Connect - 18” Satin Black Beadlock-Capable Wheels - Harman Kardon Sound System - Electric Leather Seats - Digital Rearview Mirror - Head-Up Display - Heated Seats - Ventilated Seats - Multi-Functional Steering Wheel - Blind Spot Assistance - Lane Assistance - Automatic Headlights - Paddle Shifters - Dual Zone Climate Control - Cruise Control - 360 Degree Surround Camera - Bilstein® Black Hawk® e² shock system - Selec-Speed® Control - All Round Parking Sensors - Apple CarPlay - Navigation - Bluetooth WHY BLACKLINE MOTOR COMPANY? We don't just sell cars; we hand select the finest automotive inventory in the UAE. Every Blackline vehicle undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it exceeds expectations. Trade-Ins & Consignment Welcome: Top market rates for your current vehicle. Flexible Finance: Several deposit options available. Expertise: Over 50 years of combined luxury automotive experience. VISIT OUR BOUTIQUE SHOWROOM Showroom 54, Block 6, Ras Al Khor, Dubai. https://goo.gl/maps/qZDyUVUkA4hAzZc9A OPEN 7 DAYS A WEEK Monday – Sunday: 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM CONTACT THE TEAM: •
